summary: Backend API testing completed successfully for ScriptMate mobile app. All 15 backend tests passed covering health, scripts, users, subscriptions, rehearsals, and analytics endpoints.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend is React Native (Expo) - cannot be tested via web browser. UI testing requires on-device testing via Expo Go app.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is well-structured with proper async/await handling for MongoDB operations
MongoDB _id is correctly handled internally and not exposed in API responses
Environment variables are properly used for MONGO_URL and DB_NAME
Premium gating correctly implemented with FREE_TIER_LIMITS and PREMIUM_TIER_LIMITS
Multi-region subscription pricing (US, GB, EU) is properly configured

success_rate.frontend: N/A - React Native app requires on-device testing

seed_data_creation: Test scripts and users created with TEST_ prefix during testing, automatically cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are fully functional. All endpoints tested: /api/health, /api/scripts (CRUD), /api/users, /api/users/{device_id}/limits, /api/subscription/plans, /api/subscription/regions, /api/rehearsals, /api/analyze, /api/users/{device_id}/start-trial. Frontend is Expo React Native - cannot be tested via Playwright/browser. For UI testing, use Expo Go app on physical device or simulator.

endpoints_tested: /api/scripts - POST - Creates script with AI parsing
/api/users - POST - Creates or gets user by device ID
features_verified: Scripts endpoint returns array (can be empty)
Free tier limits are correctly returned
Trial activation works with duplicate prevention
